ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the team plays */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the data is collected */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* JSON object containing handles for various social media platforms */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_code" INTEGER /* Code of the team playing the game */,
  "opponent_team_code" INTEGER /* Code of the opposing team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "final_score" TEXT /* Final score of the game (e.g., 24-17) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoff, exhibition) */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed, postponed) */,
  "home_team" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the team is playing at home */,
  "away_team" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the team is playing away */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Description of the weather conditions during the game */,
  "officials" TEXT /* JSON object containing details of the officials officiating the game */,
  "crowd_noise_level" TEXT /* A rating of the crowd noise level (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_team_code FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_code") REFERENCES teams ("team_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_code FOREIGN KEY ("team_code") REFERENCES teams ("team_code")
)
